title: OCI Wazuh Correlation Dashboard Query Pack
notes: Run the source inventory query first and confirm source names in the target tenancy.
CAP uses Windows System Events, Windows Sysmon Events, OCI Audit Logs, and OCI VCN Flow Unified Schema Logs.
Wazuh alerts are published to OCI Logging as a custom log and arrive in Log Analytics as OCI Unified Schema Logs. Filter on wazuh-alerts-json for Wazuh-specific rows.
Use make log-analytics-freshness to verify last-window Wazuh alert delivery before debugging dashboards.

queries.title: VCN Flow Actions
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI VCN Flow Unified Schema Logs' | stats count by Action | sort -count

queries.title: VCN Rejects by Source and Destination
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI VCN Flow Unified Schema Logs' and Action = 'reject' | stats count by 'Source IP', 'Destination IP', 'Destination Port' | sort -count

queries.title: OCI Audit Events by Type
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats count by 'Event Type' | sort -count

queries.title: OCI Audit Events by User and Source
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' | stats count by 'User Name', 'Source IP', 'Event Type' | sort -count

queries.title: GOAD Sysmon Event IDs
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Unified Schema Logs' and Channel = 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational' | stats count by 'Event ID' | sort -count

queries.title: GOAD Sysmon Network Connections
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Unified Schema Logs' and Channel = 'Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational' and 'Event ID' = '3' | stats count by 'Host Name', 'Process Name', 'Destination IP' | sort -count

queries.title: Linux Host Logs by Source
queries.query: 'Log Source' in ('Linux Syslog Logs','Linux Secure Logs') | stats count by 'Log Source' | sort -count

queries.title: Wazuh Alert Volume
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Unified Schema Logs' and wazuh-alerts-json | stats count as WazuhAlerts

queries.title: Wazuh Alerts Raw Search
queries.query: 'Log Source' = 'OCI Unified Schema Logs' and wazuh-alerts-json | sort -Time | head 50
